verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor tibi, Domine, in toto corde meo ;  narrabo omnia mirabilia tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אוֹדֶ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה בְּכׇל־לִבִּ֑י אֲ֝סַפְּרָ֗ה כׇּל־נִפְלְאוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: I will praise thee, O Lord, with my whole heart; I will shew forth all thy marvellous works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætabor et exsultabo in te ;  psallam nomini tuo, Altissime.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶשְׂמְחָ֣ה וְאֶעֶלְצָ֣ה בָ֑ךְ אֲזַמְּרָ֖ה שִׁמְךָ֣ עֶלְיֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: I will be glad and rejoice in thee: I will sing praise to thy name, O thou most High.

verses.latin_vulgate: In convertendo inimicum meum retrorsum ;  infirmabuntur, et peribunt a facie tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּשׁוּב־אוֹיְבַ֥י אָח֑וֹר יִכָּשְׁל֥וּ וְ֝יֹאבְד֗וּ מִפָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: When mine enemies are turned back, they shall fall and perish at thy presence.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam fecisti judicium meum et causam meam ;  sedisti super thronum, qui judicas justitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־עָ֭שִׂיתָ מִשְׁפָּטִ֣י וְדִינִ֑י יָשַׁ֥בְתָּ לְ֝כִסֵּ֗א שׁוֹפֵ֥ט צֶֽדֶק׃
verses.king_james: For thou hast maintained my right and my cause; thou satest in the throne judging right.

verses.latin_vulgate: Increpasti gentes, et periit impius :  nomen eorum delesti in æternum, et in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גָּעַ֣רְתָּ ג֭וֹיִם אִבַּ֣דְתָּ רָשָׁ֑ע שְׁמָ֥ם מָ֝חִ֗יתָ לְעוֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast rebuked the heathen, thou hast destroyed the wicked, thou hast put out their name for ever and ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inimici defecerunt frameæ in finem,  et civitates eorum destruxisti.  Periit memoria eorum cum sonitu ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָֽאוֹיֵ֨ב ׀ תַּ֥מּוּ חֳרָב֗וֹת לָ֫נֶ֥צַח וְעָרִ֥ים נָתַ֑שְׁתָּ אָבַ֖ד זִכְרָ֣ם הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.king_james: O thou enemy, destructions are come to a perpetual end: and thou hast destroyed cities; their memorial is perished with them.

verses.latin_vulgate: et Dominus in æternum permanet.  Paravit in judicio thronum suum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יהֹוָה לְעוֹלָ֣ם יֵשֵׁ֑ב כּוֹנֵ֖ן לַמִּשְׁפָּ֣ט כִּסְאֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: But the Lord shall endure for ever: he hath prepared his throne for judgment.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ipse judicabit orbem terræ in æquitate :  judicabit populos in justitia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְה֗וּא יִשְׁפֹּֽט־תֵּבֵ֥ל בְּצֶ֑דֶק יָדִ֥ין לְ֝אֻמִּ֗ים בְּמֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And he shall judge the world in righteousness, he shall minister judgment to the people in uprightness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est Dominus refugium pauperi ;  adjutor in opportunitatibus, in tribulatione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִ֘יהִ֤י יְהֹוָ֣ה מִשְׂגָּ֣ב לַדָּ֑ךְ מִ֝שְׂגָּ֗ב לְעִתּ֥וֹת בַּצָּרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The Lord also will be a refuge for the oppressed, a refuge in times of trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sperent in te qui noverunt nomen tuum,  quoniam non dereliquisti quærentes te, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִבְטְח֣וּ בְ֭ךָ יוֹדְעֵ֣י שְׁמֶ֑ךָ כִּ֤י לֹֽא־עָזַ֖בְתָּ דֹרְשֶׁ֣יךָ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they that know thy name will put their trust in thee: for thou, Lord, hast not forsaken them that seek thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Psallite Domino qui habitat in Sion ;  annuntiate inter gentes studia ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זַמְּר֗וּ לַ֭יהֹוָה יֹשֵׁ֣ב צִיּ֑וֹן הַגִּ֥ידוּ בָ֝עַמִּ֗ים עֲלִֽילוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Sing praises to the Lord, which dwelleth in Zion: declare among the people his doings.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam requirens sanguinem eorum recordatus est ;  non est oblitus clamorem pauperum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־דֹרֵ֣שׁ דָּ֭מִים אוֹתָ֣ם זָכָ֑ר לֹֽא־שָׁ֝כַ֗ח צַעֲקַ֥ת (עניים) [עֲנָוִֽים]׃
verses.king_james: When he maketh inquisition for blood, he remembereth them: he forgetteth not the cry of the humble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserere mei, Domine :  vide humilitatem meam de inimicis meis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָֽנְנֵ֬נִי יְהֹוָ֗ה רְאֵ֣ה עׇ֭נְיִי מִשֹּׂנְאָ֑י מְ֝רוֹמְמִ֗י מִשַּׁ֥עֲרֵי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.king_james: Have mercy upon me, O Lord; consider my trouble which I suffer of them that hate me, thou that liftest me up from the gates of death:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui exaltas me de portis mortis,  ut annuntiem omnes laudationes tuas in portis filiæ Sion :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֥עַן אֲסַפְּרָ֗ה כׇּֽל־תְּהִלָּ֫תֶ֥יךָ בְּשַׁעֲרֵ֥י בַת־צִיּ֑וֹן אָ֝גִ֗ילָה בִּישׁוּעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: That I may shew forth all thy praise in the gates of the daughter of Zion: I will rejoice in thy salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: exultabo in salutari tuo.  Infixæ sunt gentes in interitu quem fecerunt ;  in laqueo isto quem absconderunt  comprehensus est pes eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טָבְע֣וּ ג֭וֹיִם בְּשַׁ֣חַת עָשׂ֑וּ בְּרֶֽשֶׁת־ז֥וּ טָ֝מָ֗נוּ נִלְכְּדָ֥ה רַגְלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The heathen are sunk down in the pit that they made: in the net which they hid is their own foot taken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cognoscetur Dominus judicia faciens ;  in operibus manuum suarum comprehensus est peccator.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נ֤וֹדַ֨ע ׀ יְהֹוָה֮ מִשְׁפָּ֢ט עָ֫שָׂ֥ה בְּפֹ֣עַל כַּ֭פָּיו נוֹקֵ֣שׁ רָשָׁ֑ע הִגָּי֥וֹן סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is known by the judgment which he executeth: the wicked is snared in the work of his own hands. Higgaion. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Convertantur peccatores in infernum,  omnes gentes quæ obliviscuntur Deum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָשׁ֣וּבוּ רְשָׁעִ֣ים לִשְׁא֑וֹלָה כׇּל־גּ֝וֹיִ֗ם שְׁכֵחֵ֥י אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: The wicked shall be turned into hell, and all the nations that forget God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam non in finem oblivio erit pauperis ;  patientia pauperum non peribit in finem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א לָ֭נֶצַח יִשָּׁכַ֣ח אֶבְי֑וֹן תִּקְוַ֥ת (ענוים) [עֲ֝נִיִּ֗ים] תֹּאבַ֥ד לָעַֽד׃
verses.king_james: For the needy shall not alway be forgotten: the expectation of the poor shall not perish for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurge, Domine ; non confortetur homo :  judicentur gentes in conspectu tuo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קוּמָ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה אַל־יָעֹ֣ז אֱנ֑וֹשׁ יִשָּׁפְט֥וּ ג֝וֹיִ֗ם עַל־פָּנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Arise, O Lord; let not man prevail: let the heathen be judged in thy sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constitue, Domine, legislatorem super eos,  ut sciant gentes quoniam homines sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֘יתָ֤ה יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ מוֹרָ֗ה לָ֫הֶ֥ם יֵדְע֥וּ גוֹיִ֑ם אֱנ֖וֹשׁ הֵ֣מָּה סֶּֽלָה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Put them in fear, O Lord: that the nations may know themselves to be but men. Selah.
